answers.question: Tell me about the healthiest version of yourself you want to become.
answers.answer: I want to feel healthier, wake up earlier, walk more, and have better energy during the day.

answers.question: What does a typical day look like for you right now, and what feels hardest to change?
answers.answer: I am lethargic throughout the day and my sleeping habits are hardest to change.

6210db91-4882-4753-8f70-1f9613943dee.title: A Day With My Healthiest Self

scenes.title: Rising With the Sun
scenes.visual_description: An adult male in casual athletic wear sitting up in bed in a bright morning bedroom, stretching his arms wide above his head, warm sunlight coming through the curtains, alarm showing early morning time on the nightstand, full body side view, realistic lifestyle scene
scenes.voiceover: I wake up early now, and the morning feels fresh and full of possibility.
scenes.caption: Early mornings are my new superpower

scenes.title: Morning Walk in the Park
scenes.visual_description: An adult male in casual athletic wear walking briskly along a tree-lined park path in the early morning, arms swinging naturally, surrounded by green trees and soft golden sunlight, full body, realistic lifestyle scene
scenes.voiceover: I take morning walks now, and they charge me up with energy that lasts all day.
scenes.caption: Every step builds a stronger me

scenes.title: Fueling Up Right
scenes.visual_description: An adult male in casual athletic wear sitting at a kitchen table eating a balanced breakfast with fruits, eggs, and a glass of water, leaning forward with a relaxed and satisfied expression, bright natural kitchen light, full body, realistic lifestyle scene
scenes.voiceover: I eat a nourishing breakfast now, and it gives me steady energy and focus all morning.
scenes.caption: Good fuel powers a great day

scenes.title: Afternoon Energy Boost
scenes.visual_description: An adult male in casual athletic wear walking up a flight of outdoor stairs energetically, hand on the railing, body in full stride, urban outdoor setting with clear daylight, full body, realistic lifestyle scene
scenes.voiceover: I keep moving throughout the day now, and my energy stays strong from morning to evening.
scenes.caption: I choose movement over stillness

scenes.title: Winding Down Well
scenes.visual_description: An adult male in casual athletic wear lying on his back on a yoga mat in a calm dimly lit living room, eyes closed, hands resting on his chest, doing a relaxed breathing exercise, soft lamp light in background, full body, realistic lifestyle scene
scenes.voiceover: I wind down with intention now, and I fall asleep peacefully so I can rise strong tomorrow.
scenes.caption: Rest is part of the journey

today: Set your alarm 30 minutes earlier than usual and place your phone across the room
Take a 10-minute walk outside at any point during the day
Turn off screens 30 minutes before bed and dim the lights
thisWeek: Build a consistent wake-up time and stick to it every morning including weekends
Add a short morning walk of at least 15 minutes to your daily routine
Create a simple wind-down routine each night to improve sleep quality and morning energy

6210db91-4882-4753-8f70-1f9613943dee.narrationText: I wake up early now, and the morning feels fresh and full of possibility. I take morning walks now, and they charge me up with energy that lasts all day. I eat a nourishing breakfast now, and it gives me steady energy and focus all morning. I keep moving throughout the day now, and my energy stays strong from morning to evening. I wind down with intention now, and I fall asleep peacefully so I can rise strong tomorrow.
